creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #4)
I did it different in detail, but same in sense -- passed WITHOUT_SOMETHING= to next installworld run when it failed on <SOMETHING>.

And yes, you're right -- something is wrong there, not in the options themselves. Thanks a lot for suggestion and sorry for the noise.

I'm going to reject all similar PRs now. Hopefully will be able to resolve env issues myself.
